Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class ActivityAccountTransfer

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.ActivityAccountTransfer
public class ActivityAccountTransfer extends Object
ActivityAccountTransfer

Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    acatsAssetSequenceNumber()
    Sequence number assigned by the DTCC ACATS transfer system for each asset transferred

      Unique Identifier generated by the NSCC ACATS when a transfer is initiated or submitted

      The type of asset movement being performed within the lifecycle of an account transfer process

      Denotes whether the shares are incoming or outgoing

      Free form text field containing additional information about a transaction

    • fairMarketValue

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityFairMarketValue> fairMarketValue()
      Total value of the securities being transferred. Used for sponsored transfers activity to ensure cost basis is accurately moved with the assets to the new account

    • fairMarketValueDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityFairMarketValueDate> fairMarketValueDate()
      Date from which the asset was valued and used in the fair market value calculation

    • giftTransfer

      public Optional<Boolean> giftTransfer()
      Indicates whether the account transfer constitutes a gift for tax reporting purposes. Used by cost basis and tax systems to ensure proper tax treatment and reporting compliance.

      public Optional<String> institution()
      Contra party institution for the account transfer
